question: According to the chart data, during which period did the number of online orders increase by the larger amount?

options.C: Both periods have about the same increase in orders
options.D: The change in orders over these periods cannot be determined

explanation: The chart uses a non-linear (inappropriate) y-axis scaling function, so equal vertical distances do not correspond to equal changes in the underlying values. That can make one period look like it changed more even when the data show otherwise. 2000-2003: 40 → 49 (+9); 2004-2007: 1449 → 1475 (+26).
